title: dortmanna organensis
intro: Dortmanna organensis, also known as the 'Lady's Mantle', is a perennial flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. Traditionally, the medicinal properties of Dortmanna organensis include its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna organensis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote menstrual health and calm digestive upset.
